title: Energy Storage Solutions
subtitle: Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS)
description: We offer complete grid-tied and hybrid energy storage solutions (ESS) for residential, C&I, and utility-scale projects. Our systems support peak shaving, backup power, frequency regulation, and integration with solar PV systems.
benefits: Provides reliable backup power during outages.
Reduces electrical demand charges through Peak Shaving.
Ensures stable frequency regulation and grid compliance.
Enables high PV self-consumption by storing midday solar energy.
highlights: Customized design depending on system capacity requirements.
Scalable containerized solutions for MW-scale deployments.

title: SCADA Solutions for Utility Scale Projects & Storage
subtitle: Complete SCADA Solution Provider
description: SunLynk Solar is your comprehensive partner for controlling and monitoring solutions. We offer full support throughout all stages of your project, starting from turnkey design solutions and extending to post-OEM enhancements, troubleshooting, and training. Regardless of your project’s specific needs, our extensive experience allows us to deliver meticulous project management, on-site troubleshooting, and the ability to adapt to your evolving capacity requirements.
benefits: Quickly Understand Your Operations and Take Action
Rich Personalized Portal and Web Browser Visualization
Real-time Historical Information Helps Drive Improvements
Extensive Ad Hoc and Scheduled Reporting Delivered Information Where and When Needed
Intuitive Analytics Help Achieve Your Business Strategy
highlights: Compliance to IEC 61724 PV monitoring standards.
Universal connectivity platform supporting industry-standard open protocols.
Local Historian for database querying and report generation.
Local HMI for operators with customized screens.
Automatic Alarm Notification via email & SMS.

accordions.title: Rich Asset Monitoring
accordions.content: Operators rely on real-time HMI / SCADA and condition monitoring to keep equipment at optimal efficiency. This includes Inverter information (Generation, Fault, power), Real-time Condition Monitoring, Visualization, Alarming & Data Historian, Mobile Notifications, and support for OPC, Modbus, DNP, and IEC61400 protocols.

accordions.title: Plant Operations
accordions.content: Integration of equipment, plant, and business data into a single unified view provides command and control of the energy system. Operators can respond instantly and securely to demands. It features GEO SCADA for 3D Plant-wide Supervision, Scalable Architecture, and Smart Grid Integration (IEC61850).

accordions.title: Open Enterprise Management
accordions.content: Provides role-based analytics and intelligence. Customizable web portals enable comprehensive visibility of operational, maintenance, and financial info. It interfaces with MS SQL, SAP, Oracle, and IBM databases.

title: Weather Monitoring Solutions
subtitle: Professional Meteorological Stations
description: We specialize in delivering high-accuracy Weather Monitoring Stations (WMS) tailored for solar and wind power plants. Our solutions ensure full compliance with international standards such as IEC 61724-1, enabling accurate performance ratio (PR) calculations and resource assessment.
benefits: Precise solar irradiance measurements with Class-A pyranometers.
Real-time tracking of wind speed, wind direction, ambient temp, and module temp.
Local data backup and cloud synchronization options.
Heavy-duty mounting structures for long-term field stability.
highlights: Designed specifically for harsh environmental conditions.
Modbus RTU/TCP output for direct SCADA connection.

title: Forecasting & Now Casting Solutions
subtitle: Solar and Wind Power Forecasting
description: Our forecasting services provide solar and wind power generation forecasts to help grid operators and developers minimize scheduling penalties and optimize grid stability. We combine satellite imagery, numerical weather prediction (NWP) models, and machine learning models for high-accuracy predictions.
benefits: Compliance with state regulatory scheduling and forecasting mandates.
Advanced neural networks for day-ahead and intra-day forecasting.
Reduces deviation charges and optimization of battery scheduling.
Interactive dashboard showing forecast vs actual generation.

title: On-Grid Solar Systems
subtitle: Maximize Savings with Grid-Connected Solar
description:
SunLynk's on-grid solar systems are designed for customers who want maximum financial savings from their solar investment. These systems generate electricity during the day and seamlessly integrate with the utility grid, allowing excess power to be exported through net metering where applicable.

Our engineering team carefully designs each installation to deliver optimal performance, higher energy generation, and long-term reliability.
benefits: Lower upfront investment
Maximum reduction in electricity bills
Efficient use of available rooftop space
Grid-connected operation for seamless performance
Ideal for locations with reliable utility supply
highlights: Customized solar solutions tailored to every customer
Expert design and engineering for maximum generation

process.title: Consultation & Site Assessment
process.content: We evaluate your energy consumption, roof space, and project requirements.

process.title: Customized Proposal
process.content: Our experts design a solar solution tailored to your needs and expected savings.

process.title: Engineering & Installation
process.content: Certified professionals execute the project with quality and safety at every stage.

process.title: Commissioning & Activation
process.content: We test, commission, and ensure your system is operating efficiently.

process.title: Ongoing Support
process.content: Our team remains available for monitoring, maintenance, and long-term performance support.

title: Hybrid Solar Systems
subtitle: Reliable Power with Solar and Backup Energy
description:
Hybrid solar systems combine solar generation, battery storage, and grid connectivity to provide both savings and energy security. These systems ensure that critical loads continue operating during power outages while maximizing solar utilization.

SunLynk designs hybrid solutions for customers who value uninterrupted power supply without compromising on long-term energy savings.
benefits: Backup power during grid outages
Greater energy independence
Smart energy management
Enhanced reliability for homes and businesses
Optimized use of solar generation and battery storage
highlights: Customized solar solutions tailored to every customer
Expert design and engineering for maximum generation
